hi.title: कोस्ट कॉन्ट्रा - नो इन बिटवीन (द टेबल) निर्माता: माइक और कीज़
hi.description:
#RedBull द्वारा प्रायोजित। दुनिया भर में हमारे सभी 5वें सदस्यों को शांति!

हमने अभी-अभी 5 ट्रैक वाला EP “द फिफ्थ” रिलीज़ किया है, जिसमें कई बेहतरीन प्रोड्यूसर्स के साथ-साथ रे खलील का एक शानदार फीचर भी शामिल है। यह पूरी तरह से हिप-हॉप प्रेमियों द्वारा बनाया गया है। आपको जो भी गाने पसंद आएं, उन्हें शेयर करके द कोस्ट को सपोर्ट करें। नए मर्चेंडाइज़, विनाइल्स और अन्य चीज़ों के लिए coastcontra.com ज़रूर देखें और याद रखें, कोस्ट की तरफ से हमेशा प्यार ही प्यार!

snippet.title: Ne-Yo - So Sick (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Ne-Yo - So Sick (Lyrics)

Ne-Yo:
https://instagram.com/neyo
https://open.spotify.com/artist/21E3waRsmPlU7jZsS13rcj

Ne-Yo - So Sick Lyrics:

[Intro]
Mmm, mmm, yeah
Do, do, do, do, do, do, do-do
Ooh, yeah

[Verse 1]
Gotta change my answering machine
Now that I'm alone
'Cause right now it says that we
Can't come to the phone
And I know it makes no sense
'Cause you walked out the door
But it's the only way I hear your voice anymore

[Pre-Chorus]
(It's ridiculous)
It's been months
And for some reason I just (Can't get over us)
And I'm stronger than this, yeah (Enough is enough)
No more walking 'round with my head down (Yeah)
I'm so over being blue
Cryin' over you

[Chorus]
And I'm so sick of love songs, so tired of tears
So done with wishin' you were still here
Said I'm so sick of love songs, so sad and slow
So why can't I turn off the radio?

[Verse 2]
Gotta fix that calendar I have
That's marked July 15th
Because since there's no more you
There's no more anniversary
I'm so fed up with my thoughts of you
And your memory
And how every song reminds me of what used to be
That's the reason

[Chorus]
I'm so sick of love songs, so tired of tears
So done with wishin' you were still here
Said I'm so sick of love songs, so sad and slow
So why can't I turn off the radio?

[Bridge]
(Oh, leave me alone) Leave me alone
(Stupid love songs) Oh-oh, hey
Don't make me think about her smile
Or having my first child
I'm letting go
Turning off the radio

[Chorus]
'Cause I'm so sick of love songs (Hey), so tired of tears (So tired of tears)
So done with wishin' she were still here (Oh)
Said I'm so sick of love songs, so sad and slow (Ooh, oh)
So why can't I turn off the radio? (Why can't I turn off the radio?)
And I'm so sick of love songs, so tired of tears (So tired of tears)
So done with wishing she were still here
Said I'm so sick of love songs, so sad and slow (Hey)
Why can't I turn off the radio? (Why can't I turn off the radio?)
And I'm so sick of love songs (So sick of love songs)
So tired of tears (And I'm so sick, so sick of love song)
So done with wishing you were still here
(And I'm so sick, so sick of love songs)
Said I'm so sick of love songs, so sad and slow (Hey)
So why can't I turn off the radio?

[Outro]
Why can't I turn off the radio?
Why can't I turn off the radio?

Ne-Yo - So Sick (Lyrics)

snippet.description:
Social Medias 
Twitter: https://twitter.com/rise_zin
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100081847609321
Discord: https://discord.gg/5vzMZVYpFt
If you want to Donate to me here is my link you are not obligated to donate but it is here if you want to be :) 
https://streamlabs.com/riseofzin

Chat Rules:
1. I do Keep the Chat PG so no cuss words please
2. Be respectful to mods and everyone else
3. do not ask for mod 
4. enjoy the stream and relax :)

About Me:
Just an average gamer/streamer I always loved to play video games and I am willing to try games I never would play before. So streaming a verity of games for the PS or any system would make me want to stream more and also make it more then a hobby of mine. I started playing video games at a young age and I grew up being none social at times and pretty much shy. Now it is different now that I am 29 but still have a heart of a little kid still. I love meeting new people and hanging out Thanks for reading :).

Por estar sonando cancioncitas de amor
Melodías que relatan lo perfecto

Y envidio al que sea feliz

Yo no sé lo que es ternura

Aquí tiro la toalla
El romance y la pasión no es para mí

Sin temor a una avalancha y me caí
Que mueran las novelas de amor

snippet.title: @TheWeeknd - Blinding Lights (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
The Weeknd - Blinding Lights (Lyrics)
Stream "linding Lights" by The Weeknd: https://theweeknd.co/blindinglightsYD

Follow The Weeknd
  YouTube: @TheWeeknd 
  https://www.instagram.com/theweeknd
  https://www.tiktok.com/@theweeknd?lang=en
  https://x.com/theweeknd
  https://www.facebook.com/theweeknd

Follow Dan Music
    https://www.instagram.com/dan___music/
    https://web.facebook.com/Danmusic4/

I been tryna call
I've been on my own for long enough
Maybe you can show me how to love, maybe
I'm going through withdrawals
You don't even have to do too much
You can turn me on with just a touch, baby

I look around and
Sin City's cold and empty
No one's around to judge me
I can't see clearly when you're gone

I said, ooh, I'm blinded by the lights
No, I can't sleep until I feel your touch
I said, ooh, I'm drowning in the night
Oh, when I'm like this, you're the one I trust
Hey, hey, hey

I'm running out of time
'Cause I can see the sun light up the sky
So I hit the road in overdrive, baby
Oh-oh-oh-oh-oh

The city's cold and empty
No one's around to judge me
I can't see clearly when you're gone

I said, ooh, I'm blinded by the lights
No, I can't sleep until I feel your touch
I said, ooh, I'm drowning in the night
Oh, when I'm like this, you're the one I trust

I'm just calling back to let you know (Back to let you know)
I could never say it on the phone (Say it on the phone)
Will never let you go this time

I said, ooh, I'm blinded by the lights
No, I can't sleep until I feel your touch
Hey, hey, hey
Hey, hey, hey

I said, ooh, I'm blinded by the lights
No, I can't sleep until I feel your touch

snippet.title: bladee - Magic Misery (Official Video)
snippet.description:
bladee - Magic Misery 

Directed & Edited by Gus Reichwald
produced by Woesum & Yung Sherman

Lyrics:

Less than dead bless myself
Rest i am at rest
Throne made of stone, crown made of bones
Drained of blood, of blood
Skull crushed
Mystical, beautiful
Tragically alone
Wonderful

On top an enormous black stone wet with dew me and you, would be too good to be true
But ive fallen through the cracks of the floor in a decorated hallway, and im sorry

Magic misery,  tragic romance
Magic misery
So so souless
Magic misery
The dying spark of a star
Fuck you all
Magic misery
Endless hopeless
Magic misery
So so so dead
Magic misery
Sulfuric sick of it all
Endless frost

My wrist looks like a chainsaw its hitting like a baseball im hanging with the A-listers
Exister

I am the one that Make calls
Im paying with the Face card
Ill be there when the fake disperse
Insister

Im evil with the tazer Hire Assasinations
The Botox lizard Facelifter
Paint Pictures
Disaster
Faint Obscure

Throne made of stone, crown made of bones
Drained of blood, of blood
Skull crushed
Mystical, beautiful
Tragically alone
Wonderful

snippet.title: THE MOTHMAN is Taking Over the World... So We're Hunting It Down - Folklore Hunter (Full Release)
snippet.description:
Welcome back to Folklore Hunter! The full release is finally here, and we're tracking down the Mothman in a brand new hunt. Let's play Folklore Hunter!

Play Folklore Hunter on Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/696220/Folklore_Hunter/

Video buddy:
@SkillyMcFilly 

----------

Want more IGP?

Vastophobia: https://youtu.be/AqzgdbF6unw

FEROCIOUS: https://youtu.be/stI0YQPLF3I

Subnautica: The Prototype Expansion: https://youtu.be/I0QGGn4WBc4

MILITSIONER: https://youtu.be/_yukZLoPRME

Cronos: The New Dawn: https://youtu.be/jEXV69HNE-g

Emotionless: The Last Ticket: https://youtu.be/MGF-4V-OFOo

CLAWED Demo: https://youtu.be/lk7iD5utTuw

Body Records: https://youtu.be/_HA-iyubXec

Backrooms Extractions: https://youtu.be/mP8X8g6c-Fk

Emissary Zero: https://youtu.be/7cxDLevOXMI

Necrophosis: https://youtu.be/H30hfoqmTZM

Karma The Dark World: https://youtu.be/2rzMVwwtB84

Vastophobia: https://youtu.be/pWa7mLdECrc

R.E.P.O. - https://youtu.be/S6sWp9-vw1Q

SCP: 5K - Ghosts of the South Gate: https://youtu.be/59dImrq6vRg

Headliners: https://youtu.be/X6xOiFC3exU

SCP: Fragmented Minds: https://youtu.be/rphJl3idvvs

Subnautica: The Red Plague: https://youtu.be/U_2IqlGibAk

Go Home Annie: https://youtu.be/k_LhjGjkG-w

Confronted: https://youtu.be/RdhAmC-Bsp0

The SCP-Rooms: https://youtu.be/NalBrTGGLIk

SCP: Descent - https://youtu.be/hfOgqc8Q7iM

Full Fathom: https://youtu.be/YBp5kTLmaL4

Still Wakes the Deep: https://youtu.be/DqECUCKmpHU

POOLS: https://youtu.be/OCBYMQzG44U

Escape the Backrooms: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ohEKvUi6hTA&list=PLVxH6E2fftrdrXdbqvedOQCFGDWA7iR9H&index=1

Subnautica Modded: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tHy6uFNrWIg&list=PLVxH6E2fftreUENmLC6PQeFYiBge2Yazv&index=1

----------

About Folklore Hunter: 
You’re a world-renowned hunter of supernatural beasts. Track down urban legends from all over the world, set traps, solve disturbing puzzles, and defeat the beasts before you succumb to their otherworldly presence.

Each hunt has its own fully handcrafted environment and story to tell. Discover clues, follow maps, solve puzzles, and survive harsh environments all while uncovering unspoken mysteries. 

Only the greatest supernatural hunters will stand a chance of slaying the beast. Many have tried, many have failed. You will need to use all your stops to win this battle of wills. Hunt smart.

#igp

----------

About Folklore Hunter: 
You’re a world-renowned hunter of supernatural beasts. Track down urban legends from all over the world, set traps, solve disturbing puzzles, and defeat the beasts before you succumb to their otherworldly presence.

Each hunt has its own fully handcrafted environment and story to tell. Discover clues, follow maps, solve puzzles, and survive harsh environments all while uncovering unspoken mysteries. 

Only the greatest supernatural hunters will stand a chance of slaying the beast. Many have tried, many have failed. You will need to use all your stops to win this battle of wills. Hunt smart.

#igp

snippet.title: CA7RIEL & Paco Amoroso, Sting - HASTA JESÚS TUVO UN MAL DÍA (Official Video)
snippet.description:
CA7RIEL & Paco Amoroso, Sting - HASTA JESÚS TUVO UN MAL DÍA (Official Video)

Letra
Cuéntame tus problemas
Desnuda tus penas
Todo va a estar bien
Oh yeah
 
Yo rompí mis cadenas
Pagué mis condenas 
Y tú puedes también 
 
Ni Cartier ni Dior
Van a acompañarte en tu dolor
Ni el perico ni el alcohol
Te van a sanar
 
No no te rindas todavía
Hasta Jesús tuvo un mal día
Sigue tu corazón
Todo todo tiene solución 
 
No no te rindas todavía
Hasta Jesús tuvo un mal día
Sigue tu corazón
Todo todo tiene solución
 
Ya ya, acéptalo
Lo que te duele, suéltalo
Di bye bye, cágalo
Todo vuelve al océano
Ay (ay ay)
You can try (try try)
Don’t give up (up up)
Woman no cry
 
If they should hurt you
One more time
Lift yourself up
Over the line
Even the setting sun
Is always gonna rise
 
Ni Cartier ni Dior
Van a acompañarte en tu dolor
Ni el perico ni el alcohol
Te van a sanar
 
No no te rindas todavía
Hasta Jesús tuvo un mal día
Sigue tu corazón
Todo todo tiene solución
 
Recorre el camino de tu sanación
Sigue la luz
Resiste
Saca el demonio de tí
Free spirits 
(Adelante!)
 
No, don’t give up yet, even Jesus
Had his bad days, yes, even Jesus
Followed his heart, I know,
Everything has a solution 
 
No no te rindas todavía
Hasta Jesús tuvo un mal día
Sigue tu corazón
Todo todo tiene solución
 
Follow your heart 
Todo todo tiene solución
Follow your heart 
Todo todo tiene solución

Sigue a CA7RIEL & Paco Amoroso
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ca7rielypacoamoroso/ 
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@ca7rielypacoamoroso 

#CA7RIELYPacoAmoroso #Sting #HASTAJESUSTUVOUNMALDIA

snippet.title: The Invincible Soviet Tank Killer
snippet.description:
Soviet tanks in War Thunder are infamous for their inability to aim down, but there is a strange Cold War prototype TD that is the exception. The IT-1 ATGM carrier can depress nine degrees and is essentially invincible while hull down. After Gaijin changed ATGM controls it's very goofy to use, but still a lot of fun.

Check the channel "About" section for the link to the creator of my profile picture.

Songs used (in order from first to last):
Various Halo Soundtracks

Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/spookston

#warthundertanks #warthunder​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​ #warthundergameplay

snippet.title: Choose Your Starter Through The Seven Levels Of Pokemon!
snippet.description:
Use code SHADYFB50 to get 50% OFF your first Factor box plus free breakfast for 1 year at https://bit.ly/4lj6IxQ! #ad

We’ve randomized our starters in Pokemon Scarlet and Violet, but they're going to be revealed through the seven levels of Pokemon starters! The levels will get increasingly more and more powerful as the rounds go on! And after seven rounds, we'll build the best teams we can and have a best of three set of Pokemon battles!
